name: Fireflies at Dusk
description: Glowing fireflies drift through a twilight sky studded with twinkling stars

resolvedModules.name: Firefly Initializer
resolvedModules.description: Initializes firefly positions, velocities, glow properties and background stars

resolvedModules.name: Firefly Physics
resolvedModules.description: Composite module grouping movement and glow update logic

resolvedChildren.name: Firefly Movement
resolvedChildren.description: Drifts fireflies with gentle sine-wave motion and wraps at screen edges

resolvedChildren.name: Firefly Glow
resolvedChildren.description: Pulses each firefly's brightness using a shaped sine wave for organic glow

resolvedModules.name: Firefly Visuals
resolvedModules.description: Composite module grouping sky and firefly rendering

resolvedChildren.name: Dusk Sky Renderer
resolvedChildren.description: Draws a deep twilight gradient sky with twinkling background stars

resolvedChildren.name: Firefly Renderer
resolvedChildren.description: Renders each firefly with a soft radial glow and bright core using additive blending
